generated_oml:
instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Architectural visualization through context and container diagrams to structure software components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizeControlStrategies
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for system performance tracking"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrackSystemPerformance
]

    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for monitoring"

]

]

    base:desc "Fault detection mechanisms"

]

instance OptimizeControlStrategies : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization of control strategies for crane operations"
]

instance TrackSystemPerformance : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracking system performance through historical data logging"
]

instance MonitorSystemInRealTime : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane system behavior"
]

instance ValidateDigitalTwinModels : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of digital twin models against physical behavior"
]

instance DetectFaults : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in crane operations"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Python program interfacing with physical crane to collect state data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data including position, velocity, and operational parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplication
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Application that ingests and stores crane state data in TimescaleDB for historical logging"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control management for digital twin components via GitHub repositories"

]

instance VirtualMachineContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System dissemination using containerization (virtual machines)"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane structure and controller in research laboratory environment"
]

instance ResearchLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, DigitalTwinSystem
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [

]

]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands, such as trajectory instructions generated by the Trajectory Generator Service, are transmitted from the Control Application to the Physical Crane Interface via MQTT protocol for execution on the physical crane. Specific command types, message formats, validation and authentication mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture is visualized using the C4 Model, with ActiveMQ message broker for inter-component communication, InfluxDB for time-series data storage, and virtualization technologies for deployment. Microsoft Azure cloud services and AutomationML standard are employed for pipeline implementation and model interoperability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate using MQTT protocol in a publish-subscribe topology through an MQTT Broker for inter-service signaling. Bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with Microsoft Azure cloud services for digital twin pipeline management and AutomationML standard for model interoperability."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "AutomationML standard is used for the digital twin model in the Air Quality Management exemplar [14], and the C4 Model is applied for system architecture visualization in the lab scale gantry crane system."
